Versace 2025 Spring/Summer unisex long-sleeve T-shirt, made of 100% pure cotton fabric, is meticulously crafted for those who seek comfort and style. The fabric is delicate, soft, and highly breathable, keeping your skin dry and allowing it to breathe freely even in the slightly cool seasons of spring and autumn. The unisex design breaks gender boundaries, simple yet stylish, suitable for daily casual wear, outdoor activities, or lounging at home, showcasing unique personality and charm. Attention to detail is evident in the classic round neckline that enhances the neck line, and the cuffs and hem are neatly stitched to maintain shape and a sleek appearance. Available in multiple colors to meet different occasions and mood matching needs, allowing you to stand out in every daily setting. Sizes range from 48 to 56.
